---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

<!-- What problem does this solve? Why does Axon need this? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- How should it work? Be specific about behavior, not implementation. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- What other approaches did you think about? Why is this one better? -->

## Scope

<!-- How big is this change? Which parts of the codebase would it touch? -->
<!-- Are you willing to implement it yourself? -->
